name: Pot Pie with Greens
recipeIngredient: 2 medium leeks, halved lengthwise and thinly sliced
2 cups greens (kale, spinach, collard or turnip), chopped
1 tablespoon tamari or soy sauce, low sodium
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300 degrees.
2. Coat an 8-cup casserole dish with vegetable spray.
3. In a heavy saucepan over medium-high heat, heat olive oil.
4. Add onion and sauté, stirring until golden.
5. Add water, potatoes, and carrots; cook for 2 minutes, stirring.
6. Add leeks, tomatoes, and greens; cook for 3 minutes, or until greens wilt.
7. Reduce heat to low.
8. Add parsley, nutritional yeast (if desired), tamari or soy sauce, and broth mixture. Cook, stirring frequently, until sauce thickens slightly.
9. Adjust seasonings to taste.
10. Spoon mixture into prepared casserole dish and top with Basic Biscuit Crust. Do not seal edges.
11. Bake for 30 minutes, or until crust is lightly browned. Serves 8. Per serving: 212 calories; 5 grams protein; 4 grams fat; 39 grams carbohydrates; 8 milligrams cholesterol; 619 milligrams sodium; 5 grams fiber; vegan/vegetarian.
